The '''''Spicy Lady''''' was a [[Starship/Legends|ship]] designed after the blue prints of the [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']], crossed with an [[RZ-1 A-wing interceptor/Legends|A-wing]]. The A-wing part of the ship was able to detach and distract a fighter while the Falcon part, which carried the cargo, could escape. They could later be reattached. It was owned by the [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Jarril]] until his [[Death/Legends|death]] in [[17 ABY/Legends|17 ABY]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Rebellion]]'' {{1st}}
